creator: dstanawa@mail.usyd.edu.au
text:
After loading the MFSroot..  register dump and abort:
int=00000000 err=00000000 efl=00010006 eip=c0219224
eax=c05b9000 ebx=03000000 ecx=00000000 edx=c6569000
esi=00000000 edi=c02bd9b8 ebp=c05bafcc esp=c05bafc0
cs=0008 ds=0010 es=0010 fs=0010 gs=0010 ss=0010
cs:eip= 83 3b 00 74 if 53 8b 03-ff d0 83 c4 04 66 83 7b
ss:esp= 00 8c 5b 00 00 b0 5b 00-00 b0 5b 00 f4 af 5b c0

I may have made some transcription errors.. sorry. I have only tried
one MFS-Root and it was downloaded from ftp3.au.
It was put on disk with dd on a FreeBSD 3.1-release system (The same 
one that generated this error) with no errors. Brand new Imation disk.

Fix: 

The 3.1-RELEASE disks work fine
How-To-Repeat: Every time I boot, I get this same error.
